prompt: I need to update the price assumption in my model from $100 to $125 and then verify the change took effect. Use the idfa-ops scripts to write the new value and read it back.
assertions: Runs 'uv run scripts/idfa_ops.py write <file> Inp_Price 125' (or equivalent path)
Runs 'uv run scripts/idfa_ops.py read <file> Inp_Price' to verify the write
The read command returns the updated value 125 (not the original 100)
Both commands produce JSON output with status 'ok'
Does not modify the file manually via openpyxl or other means — uses the idfa_ops.py script exclusively
